title: PaxStressia sources file (rules/sources.json)
description: The bibliography shipped in-game as the Sources screen (DESIGN.md §14, §17) — the game citing its homework. Each entry carries an honest confidence flag so the player can tell documented record from the game's alt-history projection. Integrity rule: nothing ships as fact that isn't real; anything beyond the reliable record is flagged `alt_history`.

citation.description: Author/editor, title, year — or org + report.

note.description: What it establishes, and where it shows up in the game.

confidence.description: verified = live-checked; established = canonical/textbook; alt_history = the game's projection beyond the reliable record, NOT presented as fact.
